data.body: Pushed release commit a7fde21 to Gerrit -> change 952 (https://rebar.solutions.navateam.com/c/rebar/+/952). Trailers verified: Change-Id present, DCO Signed-off-by RebarBotNava <joeoakhart+bot@navapbc.com>, rebar-ticket resolves to 5ac8. Local make test: 7107 passed / 1 environmental teardown artifact (.tickets-tracker symlink flagged by the REPO_ROOT leak detector under the make-worktree store symlink; the test passes in isolation and is unrelated to the version-only diff). Awaiting LLM-Review +1 and Verified +1.
